use_cases: Grouping multiple related checkbox options in forms and settings interfaces
Enabling multi-select functionality for user preferences
Organizing selection options with accessible labeling and keyboard navigation
Providing a reusable checkbox container component for any application UI
ai_summary: A lightweight CheckboxGroup component that wraps Base UI's checkbox primitive with Tailwind CSS styling. Renders a flex column layout container for organizing multiple checkbox inputs with proper spacing. Designed for use in forms, settings panels, and multi-selection interfaces across desktop and mobile platforms.
